headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Arthur J. Gallagher, Lowers Price Target to $273
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Elyse Greenspan   maintains Arthur J. Gallagher (NYSE:AJG) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $298 to $273.
